query_intelligence.query: SELECT mov.codigo AS codigo, COALESCE(MAX(cat.descripcion), '') AS descripcion, COALESCE(MAX(cat.tipo), '') AS tipo, COALESCE(MAX(emp.cedulas_relacionadas), '') AS cedulas_relacionadas, COALESCE(MAX(emp.nombres_relacionados), '') AS nombres_relacionados, COALESCE(MAX(emp.apellidos_relacionados), '') AS apellidos_relacionados, COALESCE(MAX(emp.areas_relacionadas), '') AS areas_relacionadas, COALESCE(MAX(emp.carpetas_relacionadas), '') AS carpetas_relacionadas, COALESCE(MAX(emp.cargos_relacionados), '') AS cargos_relacionados, COALESCE(MAX(emp.tipos_labor_relacionados), '') AS tipos_labor_relacionados, COALESCE(MAX(emp.estados_relacionados), '') AS estados_relacionados, COALESCE(MAX(emp.moviles_relacionados), '') AS moviles_relacionados, SUM(mov.entradas) AS entradas, SUM(mov.entregas) AS entregas, SUM(mov.devoluciones) AS devoluciones, SUM(mov.consumos) AS consumos, SUM(mov.cobros) AS cobros, SUM(mov.traslados_otro_aliado) AS traslados_otro_aliado, SUM(mov.traslados_bodega) AS traslados_bodega, SUM(mov.entradas - mov.entregas + mov.devoluciones - mov.consumos - mov.cobros - mov.traslados_otro_aliado - mov.traslados_bodega) AS saldo_movil, SUM(mov.registros_cantidad_invalida) AS registros_cantidad_invalida FROM (SELECT codigo AS codigo, '' AS bodega, SUM(0) AS entradas, SUM(CASE WHEN TRIM(COALESCE(cantidad, '')) REGEXP '^-?[0-9]+([.][0-9]+)?$' THEN CAST(cantidad AS DECIMAL(18,4)) ELSE 0 END) AS entregas, SUM(0) AS devoluciones, SUM(0) AS consumos, SUM(0) AS cobros, SUM(0) AS traslados_otro_aliado, SUM(0) AS traslados_bodega, SUM(CASE WHEN TRIM(COALESCE(cantidad, '')) REGEXP '^-?[0-9]+([.][0-9]+)?$' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) AS registros_cantidad_invalida FROM logistica_movimientos_entrega WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM bd_c3nc4s1s.cinco_base_de_personal AS p WHERE p.cedula = cedula AND p.movil = 'TIRAN224') GROUP BY codigo, '' UNION ALL SELECT codigo AS codigo, '' AS bodega, SUM(0) AS entradas, SUM(0) AS entregas, SUM(0) AS devoluciones, SUM(CASE WHEN TRIM(COALESCE(cantidad, '')) REGEXP '^-?[0-9]+([.][0-9]+)?$' THEN CAST(cantidad AS DECIMAL(18,4)) ELSE 0 END) AS consumos, SUM(0) AS cobros, SUM(0) AS traslados_otro_aliado, SUM(0) AS traslados_bodega, SUM(CASE WHEN TRIM(COALESCE(cantidad, '')) REGEXP '^-?[0-9]+([.][0-9]+)?$' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) AS registros_cantidad_invalida FROM logistica_movimientos_consumo WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM bd_c3nc4s1s.cinco_base_de_personal AS p WHERE p.cedula = cedula AND p.movil = 'TIRAN224') GROUP BY codigo, '' UNION ALL SELECT codigo AS codigo, '' AS bodega, SUM(0) AS entradas, SUM(0) AS entregas, SUM(0) AS devoluciones, SUM(0) AS consumos, SUM(CASE WHEN TRIM(COALESCE(cantidad, '')) REGEXP '^-?[0-9]+([.][0-9]+)?$' THEN CAST(cantidad AS DECIMAL(18,4)) ELSE 0 END) AS cobros, SUM(0) AS traslados_otro_aliado, SUM(0) AS traslados_bodega, SUM(CASE WHEN TRIM(COALESCE(cantidad, '')) REGEXP '^-?[0-9]+([.][0-9]+)?$' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) AS registros_cantidad_invalida FROM logistica_movimientos_cobro WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM bd_c3nc4s1s.cinco_base_de_personal AS p WHERE p.cedula = cedula AND p.movil = 'TIRAN224') GROUP BY codigo, '' UNION ALL SELECT codigo AS codigo, '' AS bodega, SUM(0) AS entradas, SUM(0) AS entregas, SUM(CASE WHEN TRIM(COALESCE(cantidad, '')) REGEXP '^-?[0-9]+([.][0-9]+)?$' THEN CAST(cantidad AS DECIMAL(18,4)) ELSE 0 END) AS devoluciones, SUM(0) AS consumos, SUM(0) AS cobros, SUM(0) AS traslados_otro_aliado, SUM(0) AS traslados_bodega, SUM(CASE WHEN TRIM(COALESCE(cantidad, '')) REGEXP '^-?[0-9]+([.][0-9]+)?$' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) AS registros_cantidad_invalida FROM logistica_movimientos_devolucion WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM bd_c3nc4s1s.cinco_base_de_personal AS p WHERE p.cedula = cedula AND p.movil = 'TIRAN224') GROUP BY codigo, '') AS mov LEFT JOIN base_codigos AS cat ON cat.codigo = mov.codigo LEFT JOIN (SELECT 1 AS scope_key, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT CAST(p.cedula AS CHAR) ORDER BY p.cedula SEPARATOR '; ') AS cedulas_relacionadas, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT p.nombre ORDER BY p.nombre SEPARATOR '; ') AS nombres_relacionados, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT p.apellido ORDER BY p.apellido SEPARATOR '; ') AS apellidos_relacionados, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT p.area ORDER BY p.area SEPARATOR '; ') AS areas_relacionadas, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT p.carpeta ORDER BY p.carpeta SEPARATOR '; ') AS carpetas_relacionadas, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT p.cargo ORDER BY p.cargo SEPARATOR '; ') AS cargos_relacionados, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT p.tipo_labor ORDER BY p.tipo_labor SEPARATOR '; ') AS tipos_labor_relacionados, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT p.estado ORDER BY p.estado SEPARATOR '; ') AS estados_relacionados, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT p.movil ORDER BY p.movil SEPARATOR '; ') AS moviles_relacionados FROM bd_c3nc4s1s.cinco_base_de_personal AS p WHERE p.movil = 'TIRAN224') AS emp ON emp.scope_key = 1 GROUP BY mov.codigo HAVING saldo_movil <> 0 OR registros_cantidad_invalida > 0 ORDER BY saldo_movil ASC LIMIT 500

warnings: La consulta parece pedir el inventario asociado a la cuadrilla/móvil TIRAN224 con cruce de datos del empleado. Se interpreta prudencialmente como detalle por entidad (móvil) incluyendo información del personal relacionado, aunque no se especifica si el inventario es saldo, movimi

nombres_relacionados, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT p.apellido ORDER BY p.apellido SEPARATOR '; ') AS apellidos_relacionados, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT p.area ORDER BY p.area SEPARATOR '; ') AS areas_relacionadas, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT p.carpeta ORDER BY p.carpeta SEPARATOR '; ') AS carpetas_relacionadas, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT p.cargo ORDER BY p.cargo SEPARATOR '; ') AS cargos_relacionados, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT p.tipo_labor ORDER BY p.tipo_labor SEPARATOR '; ') AS tipos_labor_relacionados, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT p.estado ORDER BY p.estado SEPARATOR '; ') AS estados_relacionados, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT p.movil ORDER BY p.movil SEPARATOR '; ') AS moviles_relacionados FROM bd_c3nc4s1s.cinco_base_de_personal AS p WHERE p.movil = 'TIRAN224') AS emp ON emp.scope_key = 1 GROUP BY mov.codigo HAVING saldo_movil <> 0 OR registros_cantidad_invalida > 0 ORDER BY saldo_movil ASC LIMIT 500
